title: putbuildings
description: This mod is used to create the NBT schematic for a region and place it in the game.
body:
This is a structure migration mod that allows you to transfer buildings between locations in your Minecraft world. First, you can save selected chunk structures as NBT schematics (including entity saving as an optional feature). Then, you can place these chunk structures anywhere in the world. NBT schematics are exported to the `config\PutBuildings-BluePrints` directory - simply place any NBT schematic files you want to use in this folder and they will become available. The material list feature is currently preview-only, with plans to add material consumption for placement in future versions.

Requirements: Minecraft 1.20.1 | Forge 47.4.0 | Java 17

---

这是一款结构迁移模组，可以让你在Minecraft世界中转移建筑。首先可以将选定的区块结构保存为NBT原理图（包括生物保存[可选]）。然后可以将区块结构放置在世界中。NBT原理图的导出位置为`config\PutBuildings-BluePrints`，需要使用的NBT原理图放在文件夹内即可使用。材料清单功能目前仅为预览，在后续版本准备增加消耗材料放置。

使用要求： Minecraft 1.20.1 | Forge 47.4.0 | Java 17
